scripts.build:internal: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal all
scripts.build:internal:android: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal android
scripts.build:internal:ios: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal ios
scripts.build:internal:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal all --nobump
scripts.build:internal:android:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal android --nobump
scripts.build:internal:ios:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js internal ios --nobump
scripts.build:production: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production all
scripts.build:production:android: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production android
scripts.build:production:ios: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production ios
scripts.build:production:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production all --nobump
scripts.build:production:android:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production android --nobump
scripts.build:production:ios:nobump: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/build-with-confirm.js production ios --nobump
scripts.build:preview: npx expo-doctor && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:preview:fix: npx expo-doctor && eas build --profile preview --platform android -m "Firebase push registration fix"
